description: Reference environment — .NET API + Angular front end (two-process), preconfigured to import and launch. Clones coderflow-reference-apps and runs the dotnet-angular app.

docker_config.pre_clone_instructions:
RUN curl -fsSL https://dot.net/v1/dotnet-install.sh -o /tmp/dotnet-install.sh && bash /tmp/dotnet-install.sh --channel 8.0 --install-dir /usr/local/dotnet && ln -sf /usr/local/dotnet/dotnet /usr/local/bin/dotnet && rm /tmp/dotnet-install.sh
ENV DOTNET_ROOT=/usr/local/dotnet

repos.name: coderflow-reference-apps
repos.post_clone_action:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/dotnet-angular/api && dotnet restore
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/dotnet-angular/web && npm install

application_server.name: .NET + Angular
application_server.start_command:
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/dotnet-angular/api && dotnet watch run &
cd /workspace/coderflow-reference-apps/dotnet-angular/web && npm start
